ORDER GRANTING TRIAL PREFERENCE

ASBESTOS MOTION CALENDAR ON AUG-01-2006 IN 206,PLAINTIFF'S MOTION AND MOTION FOR PREFERENTIAL TRIAL SETTING PURSUANT TO CCP 36(A)&(D) WAS GRANTED. THE TRIAL DATE IS SET FOR 11/20/06 @ 11:15AM IN DEPT. 206; SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR 11/3/06 @ 9:30AM IN DEPT. 304. DISCOVERY IS OPEN UNTIL THE CASE IS ASSIGNED TO A TRIAL COURT. G.O. 140 RE: MOTIONS FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT WAS STIPULATED TO. ALL ECONOMIC EXPERT DISCOVERY IS TO BE COMPLETED 14 CALENDAR DAYS BEFORE THE TRIAL DATE, INCLUDING DEPOSITION OF ECONOMIC EXPERT. THE PARED-DOWN LIST OF EXPERTS WILL BE FAXED NO LATER THAN 14 DAYS BEFORE TRIAL DATE. NO LATER THAN 12 DAYS BEFORE THE TRIAL DATE, EACH SIDE MAY IDENTIFY UP TO THREE EXPERT WITNESSES PERCEIVED TO BE NECESSARY TO BE DEPOSED FOR MEANINGFUL SETTLEMENT DISCUSSIONS TO OCCUR. THESE EXPERTS WILL BE DEPOSED PRIOR TO THE TRIAL DATE. TRIAL WILL NOT BE DELAYED FOR THE PURPOSE OF DEPOSING EXPERTS. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE DAVID L. BALLATI; CLERK: V. MU; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE CSR #4280 (206)

REMOVED FROM ASBESTOS CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR ON APR-18-2007. ASSIGNED TO DEPT. 206 ON NOV-20-2006 AT 11:15 AM FOR TRIAL. ASSIGNED FOR MANDATORY SETTLEMENT IN DEPT. 304 ON NOV-03-2006 AT 9:30 AM.
